tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration 0018 + Drizzle schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All 6 new tables created, `erp_bpr_steps` extended with `sop_code`/`sop_version`, app_settings rows seeded, Drizzle schema in `shared/schema.ts` reflects everything.

**Files:** migrations/0018_r04_labeling_reconciliation.sql, shared/schema.ts, migrations/__tests__/0018-r04.test.ts, migrations/meta/_journal.json

**Verify:** `pnpm test migrations/__tests__/0018-r04.test.ts -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files":["migrations/0018_r04_labeling_reconciliation.sql","shared/schema.ts","migrations/__tests__/0018-r04.test.ts","migrations/meta/_journal.json"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test migrations/__tests__/0018-r04.test.ts -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["All 6 tables created with CHECK constraints + UNIQUE indexes","bpr_steps.sop_code and sop_version added","app_settings rows seeded","Drizzle schema exports all new tables + Zod schemas","Migration test asserts schema invariants"]}
```

